description_long: This bungalow features a single-story brick structure with a dark, gabled roof and a modest, symmetrical facade. The front is defined by a central entrance flanked by two large windows, a paved driveway, and a neatly manicured lawn with several mature trees and shrubs. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a spacious backyard enclosed by hedges, providing privacy and greenery. The roof includes a small dormer window, adding architectural interest and natural light to the interior. The property is bordered by a low hedge and features a driveway leading to the side of the house. The overall appearance is that of a well-maintained suburban home, blending traditional and modern elements.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a dark gabled roof, central entrance, and landscaped front and back yards with mature trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large front windows, driveway, and landscaped lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, gabled roof, and extensive backyard bordered by hedges and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a back entrance or large window, surrounded by dense greenery and a hedge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof's geometry, side windows, and the continuation of the hedge and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
